storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish a transition from a grounded, terrestrial night landscape to an abstract cosmic displacement. The sequence must move from the stillness of a mesmerized trance into a violent, high-velocity VFX sequence that ends in total darkness and cold.

## Required Cast
- protagonist

## Required Environments
- rocky_gorge_canyon
- deep_space_void

## Continuity Constraints
- Visual brightness and position of Mars (red star) in the sky
- Seamless transition from grounded canyon to abstract space sequence

## Beat List
- BT001: Observation of the landscape and Mars
- BT002: The mesmerized trance and eye closure
- BT003: Violent cosmic displacement
